titulo: Vídeo 62: Preparação para o Futuro (Manutenção e Novos Desafios)

cenas.dalle_prompt: A calendar showing a training schedule: 10-15 minutes of practice sessions scheduled 3-4 times a week. A happy dog icon is on each practice day. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera pans across the month, showing the consistent but manageable practice schedule.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A diagram showing a "Jackpot de Surpresa". The dog performs a simple, well-known command like "Senta" and unexpectedly receives a super high-value treat. Keeping the basics exciting. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A huge "JACKPOT!" animation explodes on screen when the surprise reward is given, emphasizing the concept of variable reinforcement.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A person is browsing online for new dog sports like Agility, Flyball, or Canicross. A world of new possibilities. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera scrolls through exciting images and videos of these different dog sports, sparking ideas for future activities.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is learning a brand new, complex trick not covered in the course, like skateboarding. The owner is using the same principles taught in AdaptaCão (luring, shaping, positive reinforcement). 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A split screen shows the principles from the course on one side, and the owner applying them to the new trick on the other, showing the universal applicability of the method.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a dog and owner on a grand adventure, perhaps on a mountaintop or a beautiful beach, looking towards the horizon. A symbol of their journey together. Text overlay: "A Jornada Só Está Começando". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A beautiful, inspiring, cinematic shot. The text appears with a hopeful and adventurous font.
